series_description: Eligibilities which have been approved, however no claim was filed because the sites have received a no further action status from BUSTR and are closed.
retention_statement: Paper: Five years after the NFA

series_description: Includes all documentation relating to appeals of Director's orders, eligibility determinations, claim settlements, denials or revocations or certificate of coverage, and financial and technical audits.
retention_statement: Paper: Five years from the date the latest may have been sought. For claims, five years from the later of the following two events: The date the claim is closed or the last claim is settled, or the date the latest appeal may have been sought

series_description: Claim applications which have costs which do not exceed the owners required deductible amount.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain five years from the date the claim is closed

series_description: An owner is required to submit for cost pre-approval, interim response actions requiring BUSTR pre-approval, remidial action plans, Teir 3 Evaluation Plans and Tier Evaluation Monitoring Plans. In addition, owners may submit other costs voluntarily for pre-approval.
retention_statement: Paper: If a claim package has been filed, the cost pre-approval is an intergral part of the claim and is retained pursuant to the retention schedule for claim records. If eligibilty has been approved but no claim is filed
